commands.description: Use Python's ipaddress module to programmatically generate a list of all usable host IP addresses within a CIDR block.
Use sipcalc for a more detailed breakdown including broadcast, network, and subnet mask information in a structured format.
Perform a 'Ping Sweep' to identify active hosts within a CIDR range without performing a full port scan.
Display the subnet mask specifically using the ipcalc -s flag for quick verification of network boundaries.
Use grepcidr to filter large log files or lists of IPs to see which ones fall within a specific CIDR range.
